purpose: Tracks real engagement-feedback gaps found during Phase 0 audits — moments where a real user action/event already fires but has no corresponding feedback (sound, animation, notification). Feeds Rule 25's future Opportunity Engine; not itself an implementation.

findings.description: Real level-up event already dispatches and is already listened to for a visual toast, but no sound plays. A genuine player earns a level and gets silence.
findings.fixScope: trivial — single playSound() call in GamificationHUD.tsx

findings.description: Rare-drop XP multiplier event dispatches from useGamificationEngine.ts but has zero listeners anywhere in the app — the event is dead on arrival, no visual or audio feedback at all for a rare moment that should feel special.
findings.fixScope: needs a listener built, plus a real sound asset sourced (none exists yet)
